Same problem here! iPhone 15 Pro, crashes on Get Started every time. Submitted a ticket but no response.
Thanks for flagging - we have a fix going out in build 1.0.3. Can you DM us your device logs?
Looks like a JS bridge crash. Have you tried clearing app data?
Three days in and still cannot complete onboarding. P0 blocker.
Same blank screen on my Pixel 8! After Bluetooth permission it just hangs forever. Duplicate of this report.
Confirmed reproducible on Pixel 7 Pro too. P0 issue, same screen.
Keyboard issue confirmed on S24 base model too. Form is unusable without scroll workaround. Duplicate.
Classic keyboard avoidance bug. Easy fix on the dev side but blocking onboarding for many users.
OTP also broken for me. Verizon, iPhone 14 Pro. Never received a single code in 6 attempts. Duplicate issue.
AT&T here, same OTP failure on Pixel 8. Connect is unusable until this is fixed.
Hey everyone - we identified an SMS gateway issue with one of our regional providers. Patch deploying tonight. Apologies for the friction!
Landscape support on iPad is just broken across the board for Connect. Hoping this gets prioritized.
Definitely a constraint issue. Looks like the layout is hard-coded for portrait phones. P2 but very visible.
Confirmed crash on OnePlus 11 too. Profile setup step is a dead end. Submitted crash logs via the in-app reporter. Duplicate.
This looks like the same NullPointer we tracked internally. Same stack trace?
Thank you for posting this. Connect dark mode fails WCAG AA contrast in multiple places. Real accessibility regression.
This is at least a P1 accessibility regression, not P2. Hope the design team sees this.
Same infinite spinner here. Tried reinstall, same result. Duplicate.
OTP fix patch supposedly went out but I am STILL not getting codes. Anyone else?
We are aware - second patch in QA. ETA tomorrow morning. Apologies for the delay.
Avatar upload step crashes the entire app on Pixel 6a too. Definitely a wider issue. Duplicate.
Looks like memory pressure on image decode. They probably need to scale down the upload preview.
